title: phyllanthus macrochorion
intro: Phyllanthus macrochorion, also known as the 'Malayan spiny bryony', is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus macrochorion is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
